title: Example Scripts API Validation
summary: Validated all 7 example scripts in examples/ directory - all pass with no API changes or import errors. Tested: quick_start.py, ckvd_cache_control_example.py, ckvd_lazy_initialization_demo.py, ckvd_logging_demo.py, clean_feature_engineering_example.py, sync/ckvd_datetime_example.py, sync/ckvd_one_second_test.py. Minor note: ckvd_one_second_test.py has an unclosed SSL socket warning but completes successfully.
